title: Stari's Redstone Pack
description: Adds various tweaks to enhance your redstoneing
body:
![srp big final](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b11fc1dfc6a70030d3db6c7e360105fafa3915c2.png) # ENHANCE YOUR REDSTONE EXPEARANCE This Texture Pack adds plenty of retextures of redstone items like: - Flat Redstone Lines - Directional Pistons - More static wool (bland / simple) - Repeater Redo - And more! You can see all these textures on the [gallery](http://modrinth.com/resourcepack/staris-redstone-pack/gallery)
Thanks for checking out my pack! 💖
